title: Investor Pitch Literacy Challenge
promise: Pitch-structure knowledge challenge for problem, why now, traction, ask, Q&A, and follow-up.
audience: Founders preparing investor meetings, accelerator cohorts, venture studios, and startup advisors
description: Knowledge quiz across Pitch Structure, Problem & Customer, Traction & Ask, Delivery & Follow-up. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and answer review after completion.
ogTitle: Investor Pitch Literacy Challenge - Outfinity Quiz
ogDescription: Learn the typical structure and decision logic behind a clear investor pitch.
